posts.title: A Fake Courier App Almost Compromised My Friend’s PhonePe
posts.excerpt: “A friend fell for a courier‑based WhatsApp scam, installed a malicious APK, and had her PhonePe account compromised. This is how the attack worked, and how we fixed.

posts.title: Jailbreaking Deepseek: The Tom and Jerry Method
posts.excerpt: Jailbreaking an LLM involves crafting a prompt that tricks the model into ignoring its safety guidelines.
